use_cases: Display user profiles in social platforms and communities
Show team member information in SaaS dashboards
Present creator or influencer profiles in content platforms
Display contact cards in marketplace or directory listings
Show user information in real-time collaboration tools
ai_summary: A profile card component with animated grid background and neumorphic-inspired layered shadows supporting dark/light mode. Displays user avatar, name, role, online status indicator, verification badge, tags, and follower count with smooth hover animations. Designed for social platforms, SaaS dashboards, and creator economy applications.
